species: Here we employ X-ray crystallography and single-particle cryo-EM to solve structures of the Arabidopsis thaliana GLR3.4.
tissue: GLR3.4 expresses at the plasma membrane of root phloem cells, vascular bundles, mesophyll cells, and guard cells.
cell_type: GLR3.4 expresses at the plasma membrane of root phloem cells, vascular bundles, mesophyll cells, and guard cells.
sample_source: Expression construct pGreenII-OLE1p::OLE1::eGFP atUBQ10p::atglr3.4(gDNA)::eGFP was transformed into Agrobacteria strain GV3101...
cell_line: We expressed full-length GLR3.4 in HEK 293 cells...
